title: 2 Pack Birthday Bottle Bag Black Wine Bags with "Happy Birthday" Design Tissue Paper & Gift Cards
features: Perfect for Wine Gifts: Each gift bag measures 36× 12× 9cm, ideal for standard wine bottles, champagne, or similar-sized beverages. Make birthday gifting easy and elegant!
Set of 2 Bags: Includes 2 reusable wine gift bags with 2 tissue paper and 2 cards, a practical and stylish option for celebrating multiple birthdays or keeping one on hand for last-minute gifts.
Festive Birthday Design: Features a cheerful "Happy Birthday" print that add a fun, celebratory touch to your birthday present.
Durable & Sturdy: Made from quality paper with reinforced handles, these wine bags are strong enough to hold heavy bottles securely without tearing.
Convenient Carry Handles: Equipped with sturdy handles for comfortable carrying and stylish presentation—perfect for parties, birthdays, and special occasions.
description: Product Features: Birthday Wine Gift Bags with Tissue Paper & Gift Cards Specifications: Product Material: Paper Product Color: Black, Kraft Product Size: 36× 12× 9 cm/14.17× 4.72× 3.54 inches Package Includes: 2× bottle gift bags 2× card 2× tissue paper
